RULING:
PLAINTIFF'S MOTION TO CONTINUE THE TRIAL DATE AND RE-OPEN EXPERT DISCOVERY

No objections made and tentative ruling adopted: Plaintiff's motion to continue the trial date and re-open expert discovery for the limited purpose of replacing plaintiff's expert Dr. Herman Bruch is granted. The trial date is continued to July 27, 2015 at 11:15a.m. in Department 503. Expert discovery is re-opened solely to allow the following: plaintiff may designate an expert in place of Dr. Bruch and such expert may prepare a report and be presented for deposition; if needed, defendants may supplement their expert witness designation limited to responding to plaintiff's new designation. Discovery is re-opened to allow any party to obtain plaintiff's updated medical records. This re-opened discovery closes on the new trial date. All other expert and fact discovery remains closed. No opposition filed. Order signed in open court. Judge: Teri L. Jackson, Matter not reported (503/TLJ)
